unit: Unit 12: Everyday Life with Your Computer
title: A Day in Your Digital Life
drDigitalIntro: You'll simulate a day using your computer: check email, look up directions, read weather, watch a video, add a calendar event, set a reminder, search for something, take a note, and use banking or shopping. This assessment brings together years of learning into realistic, everyday tasks.
drDigitalSuccess: You're ready for real computer use!
drDigitalHint: This is how people actually use computers — for real things.
